title: CI Failure Classification — Happy Path: Failures Labeled by Category in CI Results
given: An engineer views a failed CI run on PR #4530 where 3 tests failed: 'test_checkout_flow' (caused by the PR's code change), 'test_db_connection_retry' (a known flaky test in quarantine), and 'test_artifact_upload' (failed due to a network timeout to the artifact store)
when: The CI results page loads for PR #4530
then: The test 'test_checkout_flow' is labeled as 'change-related failure' (red), 'test_db_connection_retry' is labeled as 'known flaky test' (yellow), 'test_artifact_upload' is labeled as 'infrastructure failure' (gray), and the overall PR status reflects only the change-related failure from 'test_checkout_flow'
